profile_backing.profile_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass181-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg --quick --noplot

lever.description: Reuse inverse-iteration scratch in the real eig eigenvector path, avoiding per-iteration complex shifted-matrix and RHS allocations.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf48-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --quick --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf48-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --quick --noplot

delta.decision: Reject: improvement is too small to keep as a shipped source change.

behavior_proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-p1vbf48-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib eig -- --nocapture
isomorphism: Candidate preserved Hessenberg QR iteration, deflation thresholds, eigenvalue ordering, inverse-iteration count, pivot selection, tie handling, and complex arithmetic order inside each solve.
Candidate introduced no RNG and changed no dtype, shape, or error surface.
No source change is shipped after rejection; final tree behavior is bit-for-bit the pre-candidate behavior.

next_route.target_ratio: >= 1.10x on same-worker eig48 before considering source shipment
next_route.notes: Allocation scratch reuse is not the right depth. Route next to blocked/recursive Hessenberg-Schur or batched inverse-iteration structure, with profile/golden proof first.
